short_description: Manage Lake Trust accounts on the go in a secure and seamless mobile experience.
full_description:
Lake Trust Credit Union’s Mobile App makes it easy to manage your accounts. And get closer to your financial goals. All from your mobile device. It’s fast, secure, and free.  

- Check available balances & transaction history 
- Deposit checks from your iPhone or iPad 
- Pay bills and credit cards 
- Transfer money between Lake Trust accounts 
- Transfer money to other financial institutions  
- Find Lake Trust relationship centers, ATMs & VTMs 
Send us a message 

You must be a Lake Trust member and enrolled in our online banking service. To sign up, visit www.laketrust.org.

reviews.text: Easy to access and navigate the app. Customer service both in person and on the phone are professional and helpful.
